description: Marriage contract. Groom: Yefet b. Saʿadya. Bride: Ḍiyāʾ bt. Yehuda. One of the witnesses is Mevorakh b. ʿElī Ibn Zarʿa. Location: Fustat. Dating: Thursday, 14th of Adar, ca. 1020 CE. The marriage gift amounted to 50 dinars, and the dowry to 240 dinars (Information in part from Goitein notes and index card linked below and from Goitein, MedSoc, Vol. 3, p. 403.)
